name: Platform Taxonomy
description: Given a business landing page summary and web-search results, generate a dynamic platform taxonomy (categories + domain rules) for this business/region. Use this to classify discovered URLs across any ecosystem (India, China, US, etc.) without hardcoded lists.

businessUrl.description: Business landing page URL (optional but recommended).

businessSummary.description: Short landing-page summary (e.g. output text from business-scan).

searchResultsJson.description: JSON string containing web-search results {query, results:[{title,url,snippet}]}. You can pass output.data from web-search.
